content:
The ability to see the full date and time was added in v18, which I believe your running.

Navigate to settings > general settings > display: Date Time Format. Assign either 'Full' or 'ISO'.

The change in picture display behaviour stems from a redesign of general attachment placement. They were moved to the top of emails making them more visible and accessible. This had the side effect that picture attachments are not automatically displayed.

A bug report is raised on github about this, linked below. https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues/10889
creator: platform34
